case_title: SUSAN MCDEVITT VS. THE NATIONAL FOOTBALL LEAGUE PLAYERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDEVITT, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT THE NATIONAL FOOTBALL LEAGUE PLAYERS ASSOCIATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDEVITT, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE NATIONAL FOOTBALL LEAGUE PLAYERS ASSOCIATION $4,085.10 PRINCIPAL, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,238.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDEVITT, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT THE NATIONAL FOOTBALL LEAGUE PLAYERS ASSOCIATION
